fields.label: GitHub App ID
fields.description: Numeric GitHub App ID from your GitHub App settings

fields.label: GitHub Installation ID
fields.description: Installation ID of the GitHub App on your organisation/account

fields.label: Private Key Path
fields.description: Absolute path to the .pem private key file inside the container (e.g. /app/plugins/ghrm/github-app.pem)

fields.label: OAuth Client ID
fields.description: Client ID of the GitHub OAuth App used for user authentication

fields.label: OAuth Client Secret
fields.description: Client secret of the GitHub OAuth App

fields.label: OAuth Redirect URI
fields.description: Full callback URL registered in the GitHub OAuth App (e.g. https://yourdomain.com/software/github/callback)

fields.label: Software Category Slugs
fields.description: Comma-separated list of tariff plan category slugs that expose the Software tab on plan edit forms (e.g. backend,fe-user,fe-admin)

fields.label: Catalogue CMS Page Slug
fields.description: Slug of the CMS page used for category index and package list pages — its layout and style sheet will be applied. Run populate-ghrm to create the default page.

fields.label: Detail Page CMS Page Slug
fields.description: Slug of the CMS page used for package detail pages — its layout and style sheet will be applied. Run populate-ghrm to create the default page.

fields.label: Grace Period (days)
fields.description: Days after subscription cancellation before GitHub collaborator access is revoked
